message:
refactor(db): wrap all short-lived pool/search connections in DbConnGuard

Replace bare drop(conn) and unguarded connection bindings with
guard_db_conn() / close_db_conn() across integrity checks, WAL
checkpoints, migration init, consistency probes, recovery paths, and
search backfill. Each site gets a descriptive static context label
for diagnostics if close fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
